perks.name: Ranged Combat Training
perks.description: After some training at the shooting range you can deal more damage with ranged weapons. [20% more damage, ammunition grants armor penetration]

perks.name: Eagle Eye
perks.description: By concentrating only on your target and holding your breath, you can now aim much more precisely. [Zoom in by holding right mouse button]

perks.name: Marksman's Focus
perks.description: When fully focusing on your target, everything around you seems to slow down remarkably. [Time slows down while zooming, +25% critical hit chance]

perks.name: Quick Shot
perks.description: You have learned to draw and fire in one single movement. [+50% draw speed with heavy bows, +100% with light bows]

perks.name: Rapid Reload
perks.description: Your have familiarized yourself with the mechanics of your crossbow. [+50% reload speed with heavy crossbows, +100% with light crossbows]

perks.name: Power Shot
perks.description: You have discovered the art of aiming at tendons and joints. [Bows do 100% more poise damage, move forward and hold bash to perform power shot which costs 100 Stamina]

perks.name: Stunning Precision
perks.description: Any successful staggering shot will almost always stun the target momentarily. [Staggering hits will also stun the target]

perks.name: Precise Aim
perks.description: Your aim is now precise enough to target weak spots in the enemy's defenses. [30% more damage]

perks.name: Piercing Shot
perks.description: You've learned how to hit the weakest parts of armor. [+50% armor penetration from ammunition]

perks.name: Penetrating Shot
perks.description: You've mastered the technique of hitting weak armor parts. [additional +60% armor penetration from ammunition when not sneaking and +10% critical hit chance and damage when sneaking]

perks.name: Ranger
perks.description: You improved your footwork when engaging in ranged combat with light weapons. [Able to run with a drawn light bow or crossbow]

perks.name: Sniper
perks.description: You can keep steady aim with heavy ranged weapons, dealing more damage with sneak attacks. [1.2x irresistible sneak attack damage with heavy bow or crossbow and 1.3x extra damage with heavy bows or crossbows]

perks.name: Hidden Blade
perks.description: Throwing knives penetrate the flesh, interrupting the target. [25% chance to stagger targets with throwing knives, unlocks secondary dagger abilities when using a bow]

perks.name: Sharp Throw
perks.description: You can throw knives more precisely. [50% more damage with throwing knives]

perks.name: Hunter
perks.description: You are more adapted to the wildlife, and better understand its inhabitants. [Do 20% more damage to animals and take 10% less damage from animals, +10% poison and disease resistance]

perks.name: Hunter
perks.description: You are more adapted to the wildlife, and better understand its inhabitants. [Do 40% more damage to animals and take 20% less damage from animals, +20% poison and disease resistance]

perks.name: Bow Strike
perks.description: You can use your bow or crossbow as a melee weapon in close combat. [Double damage with bow bash, bow bash staggers targets, 50% less bow bash stamina cost]

perks.name: Focus on the Prey
perks.description: Cannot be staggered while holding a drawn bow or reloading a crossbow.

perks.name: Three Crows
perks.description: Shooting a target beyond 25 feet three times in rapid succession, leaving less than 2.75 seconds between each hit, deals bonus damage equal to 15% of the target's current Health (max. 150 damage) and knocks the target to the ground.

perks.name: Lion's Arrow
perks.description: Grants power to store your currently dual-cast spell. Shooting a fully drawn bow releases at a lower strength, scaling with archery skill, toward the crosshair, costing 50 Magicka. Only works with spells that target others.
